The '''island-beasts''' were colossal floating grazers native to [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]] where they inhabited the upper atmosphere. Island beasts kept themselves afloat by storing gas inside their huge hollow bodies. They had thousands of tendrils hanging from their undersides and a hole on top and one at the bottom for intake and releasing gas.

The [[Wind Raiders/Legends|Wind Raiders]] tribe of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] had domesticated some of these creatures and used them as their homes, having built camps inside of them. Its tendrils were typically one to two kilometers long.

==Appearances==
